mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_alert SET product_id = #{productId}, sku_id = #{skuId}, product_name = #{productName}, sku_code = #{skuCode}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, current_stock = #{currentStock}, threshold = #{threshold}, alert_level = #{alertLevel}, alert_status = #{alertStatus}, alert_message = #{alertMessage}, alert_time = #{alertTime}, resolved_time = #{resolvedTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inventory_alert WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_alert WHERE warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_alert WHERE alert_level = #{alertLevel} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_alert WHERE alert_status = #{status} ORDER BY alert_time DESC
SELECT * FROM inventory_alert ORDER BY alert_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_alert SET alert_status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
